records.m_Talk_ENG: I learned from my superior that we soldiers must remain cool-headed while on our missions.

9n ta, ta s8689 gi8691t ng98~98qi.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what it means to go up against something like that again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could really be the end of us this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a world where destruction is determined, there is nothing you can do to save it or its people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What will it be, Major? Will you join me and head to the world where the Administration exists?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means that I die, I won't be a coward and run away or give up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, it may be arrogant of me to ask this, but...
